Name: Ragdoll System
Author: zysilm
Description: Applies ragdoll physics to characters when they die in-game. Features per-bone physics configuration, hair physics simulation, terrain collision, and optional NPC death ragdoll support. Non-humanoid NPCs are handled gracefully with automatic bone-set detection.

Name: Combat Simulator
Author: zysilm
Punchline: Fight existing NPCs in client-side combat simulation.
Description: A client-side combat simulator that lets you fight existing NPCs locally. Features NPC AI, combat animations, death effects (ragdoll physics), active camera (bone tracking), death cam, HP overlays, and glamourer integration. All combat is simulated locally - no data is sent to the server.
